subject: The Hustle — Boring biz, big money: laundromats are back
bodyHtml:
Laundromats had a 14% revenue jump in 2025 according to Coin Laundry Association data. Indie operators are bundling subscription wash-and-fold (Stoic Wash, $59/mo, 2,400 subscribers in 6 months).

Why now: rising rents push apartments smaller. In-unit laundry is becoming a luxury.

Solo angle: buy one struggling location for ~$200k SBA-loan-financed and stack subscription on top.

Full breakdown | unsubscribe
